member.name: T:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost
M:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.Compile(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Compile a script file. Returns the compiled artifacts (DLL, runtimeconfig, deps.json, manifest). Does not run the script.

member.name: M:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.RunAsync(System.String,System.String[],System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.ScriptConnection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Compile and run a script file. Captures stdout/stderr.

member.name: M:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.RunSnippetAsync(System.String,System.String[],System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.ScriptConnection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Compile and run a code snippet. Wraps it in a minimal script file.

member.name: M:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.ExecuteAsync(SeaShell.Engine.ScriptCompiler.CompileResult,System.String[],System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.ScriptConnection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Run an already-compiled script. Use this when you want to compile once and run multiple times, or when you need to inspect the compilation result. Supports script-initiated reload and watch mode (file-change hot-swap).
Run a single instance, returning when it exits or requests reload.

member.name: P:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.NuGet
member.summary: Access the NuGet resolver for pre-downloading packages.

member.name: M:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.CreateUpdater
T:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.ScriptConnection
member.summary: Bidirectional application messaging between Host and Script. Create an instance, subscribe to MessageReceived, and pass it to ExecuteAsync/RunAsync/RunSnippetAsync.

member.name: E:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.ScriptConnection.MessageReceived
member.summary: Fires when the script sends an application message. Parameters: payload (raw bytes), topic (optional routing key). Called on the channel-drain thread.

member.name: M:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.ScriptConnection.SendAsync(System.Byte[],System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a binary message to the running script.

member.name: M:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.ScriptConnection.SendAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a string message (UTF-8) to the running script.

member.name: M:SeaShell.Host.ScriptHost.ScriptConnection.StopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a ScriptStop message to gracefully shut down the script.
